perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a large blue mascot of a cartoon character called 'Rebellious Fairy' standing in front of a themed wall in an exhibition hall. (2) The camera follows the mascot as it walks through the entrance of 'Achu Konderland' booth, passing shelves stacked with blue merchandise boxes. (3) The vlogger shows various products on display, including plush dolls, badges, t-shirts, and stationery featuring the character and its friends. (4) The mascot attempts to use a gashapon machine but struggles with its large plush hands, while the vlogger assists in revealing a character badge from a purple capsule. (5) The mascot shows an 'angry' expression through its fixed facial design while interacting with the small badge and reacting to the vlogger's jokes. (6) The final shot shows the mascot waving in front of the booth's schedule board.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music with a quirky, toy-like melody starts immediately. (2) A male voice (vlogger) begins speaking in an excited, high-pitched, and humorous tone in Mandarin. (3) Sound effects include heavy thumping steps when the mascot moves and a cartoonish 'fart' sound when the vlogger makes a joke. (4) Ambient noise of a crowded exhibition hall, including distant voices and shuffling, is audible under the music. (5) Mechanical clicking sounds are heard when the gashapon machine is turned, followed by a plastic clatter as the capsule drops. (6) The vlogger's laughter and enthusiastic exclamations continue until the music fades out at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '叛逆仙子帶你逛阿啾的攤位' (Rebellious Fairy takes you to Achu's booth) - Functional hook text. (2) '叛逆叛逆叛逆...' - Decorative repetitive text emphasizing the character's name. (3) '好，跌倒' (Okay, trip) - Humorous commentary on the mascot's movement. (4) '就看到滿滿的叛逆仙子娃娃' (You see plenty of Rebellious Fairy dolls) - Functional narration subtitle. (5) '八月七號到八月十一號一定要來' (Must come from August 7th to August 11th) - Promotional informational text. (6) '文博會' (Creative Expo) - Contextual information text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Booth Tour -> Product Demonstration -> Interactive Gashapon Segment -> Closing Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 mascot performer, 1 male vlogger (hands/voice), 2 background staff/visitors.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A large, round blue plush mascot suit with pointed bat-like ears, yellow eyes, and an 'angry' frowning expression. The vlogger is only visible via his hands holding products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor exhibition booth filled with colorful merchandise, character cutouts, shelves of plush toys, and branded banners with the name 'ACHU KONDERLAND'.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Achu Konderland' pop-up booth at the Creative Expo Taiwan. The video uses the mascot character to create a fun, engaging tour of the available merchandise and activities (like the gashapon machine) to encourage fans to visit during the specified dates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of booth location, dates, and showcasing of specific merchandise with prices and features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched enthusiastic narration, use of a signature blue mascot, and humor-driven character interaction.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets fans of Taiwanese webcomics/animation, using a first-person 'tour' perspective to make the viewer feel like they are visiting the event with the creator.
